Salvador wants Sigil Yield WoDs with the “Camera” Purple WoD.

Ogier has a “Bloody Heart thingy” that is Crit Dmg, but we want Shield Amp or Sigil Yield. Death Res or Dmg Amp if you dont have the other two mentioned above. Nautila runs the same way as Ogier. The Golden WoD on Naut might be better on Ogier as well.

Actually one more. Sorry….
Salvador wants “Paradox” or “Cursed Rabbit” CoV. Ogier wants “Feast from Afar” Cov, and so does Nautila.
Shield Amp is anything that the passive says “Increase Shield Size by 15%” or something similiar

FYI: This team is brilliant. 

With Tulu wheel, first turn Jenkin is close to exalt. 

So you play Waltz. Get 1 tentacle and get Keyflare.

Wiith Keyflare you rouse Jenkin. And with 2 tents you switch to red stance.

Exalt Jenkin and kill mob. Next battle.

Boss fights you rouse FMurphy first. With Winkle it's easy to get to OE.

All it needs is a health relic.
With Aurita posse you can cycle your whole deck and fish out Murphy 3 cost almost every turn to remove sacrifice....

Heya guys i need some insights.

I'm currently debating whether to pickup Kathigu-ra or Pollux on the free char selector. Current plan is to E3 castor using monthly dupes, and then E3 clem after, after which I don't have any plan anymore.

On one hand I like pollux and castor and the story behind them, on the other Kath has guns and big boom. From what I've researched both wants E3, with Kath needing E3 to be functional. Pollux deals lotsa damage and can be OP with OE , buit Kath is a literal one-man army, but what do you guys think?
I don't have pollux and I run castor with Jenkins

you're basically spot on with your analysis so far. what is worth considering is that pollux obviously wants to go with clem and castor, but castor is capable of being the main carry once he's E3. whether you want to further boost that team, or build into a second team with kath is totally up to you. kath is extremely flexible in what supports she can be good with and you can also always run her with ultra supports as well if you wanted to use her in that team. 

i think generally kath tends to be rated higher, but it's close enough that i would say try out both of their trials and pick the one that seems more fun to play for you
Can Kath offset Leigh's terrible base stats?
I also like Leigh lmao
thank you for your insight tho <@1439780354763259994>
Does this team work if i want to turn my gmurphy into a carry
typically you want goliath over faros if you own him
I dont have goli, whats his role on the team?
he's mostly just a support that you put some utility wheels onto. he is good at generating strength to increase gmurphys damage.
if you don't have him, don't sweat it too much. he's on the standard banner so you'll find him soon enough
Who do i use in place
faros is fine for now since she still lets you maximize the passive bonuses from gmurphy
Btw should i get dupes of gmurphy
if you are wanting to use her as a damage carry then yeah probably. it's worth noting that you can get a dupe for free each month in the shop, so don't feel like you have to do it right this second

I do have one question and sorry if im asking in the wrong channel but can i be a story / events only player without touching any of the end games or do end game give needed resources ?

some of the shop tabs require currency from the "endgame" modes, but you can do those modes on low difficulty and still accrue the resources. you don't HAVE to sweat on the endgame stuff if you don't want to. i don't even do dtide (this games equivalent of endgame), and i've beated all of arc 1 already and have been doing fine on arc 2 so far
Okay thank u very much i actually was worried about this part

no problem! you'll probably be able to get more characters built a little faster by doing that content more, but it's not strictly required by any means. and plus you really can do it on easy mode if you're not concerned with maxing out your progression speed and just getting a bit fewer resources per cycle
Furthermore, don’t sweat endgame.
You have plenty of helpful members in this channel that can support you
Always here if you need help with team building or answering any questions

HOLY SHI I CAN
Genesis units can be on the same team as their Non Genesis counterpart except for Ramona

Little tidbits of changes. You can put Erica instead of Clem on Pollux team, as Erica works really well with Castor. Winkle can replace Ramona and help fuel OE’s or Exalts on Pollux team.

Clem can replace Casiah in Corpo team, and if Corpo is E3, then Goliath would be better for Burst Turn then Caecus. 

A more offensive option is E1 Horla for Cantena team as Horla Exalt offers higher burst(CR/CD in Anger with Passive Dmg Amp), 0 cost Aliemus fueling, and at E1, a 1 Turn Weakness on “Defense”(which is a really good cheap Weakness App). Horla would replace Faint, but Faint is perfectly fine as a “safer” option. 

Inferno being in Kath team is alright as long as you generate enough Keyflare for Kath.
I would use Winkle but Incalc was already used up by Miryam
and it felt pointless without it
1 copy. At endgame, as many dupes as you can since Jenkin is a Standard Awakener and further Stats increases are amazing with Lvl Cap Increase. E1 is the answer.
btw I kid u not Faint literally saved me by having 5 death res procs before the enemy died to Bleed 💀
Horla would NOT have been able to do that

Even without Incal, Winkle fueling more Aliemus(30~) is nice to push for another Exalt. If Winkle is E3, you can Exalt twice in one turn which is much more Burst/Survival. Her 2 cost is another weak source, and more Keyflare.

That’s a more offensive version, which would require a stronger Cantena. Since we aren’t there yet, we can keep it at Faint. Just a alternative for the future once your Cantena is much stronger and just nukes enemies~ 
(Something to keep in mind)
